title: Packit: disable OpenScanHub scans
body:
Reenabling them can be considered in the future if OpenScanHub starts scanning Go code.

<!--

comments.body: As of today, [more than 3900](https://openscanhub.fedoraproject.org/task/?search=podman) scans have been submitted, but most of the [results](https://openscanhub.fedoraproject.org/task/55667/log/podman-5.6.0~dev-1.20250513171328537880.main.867.863621ee5a/scan-results.html) are either harmless or false positives.

> .packit.yaml:44: Reenable ==> Re-enable

You have a typo so please fix so this can pass CI. change itself LGTM
